mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_CART( USER_ID, ITEM_ID, ITEM_TYPE, AVAIL_DAY, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{itemType}, #{availDay}, #{insertUserId}, #{insertDt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AVAIL_DAY = #{availDay}, UPDATE_DT = NOW(), UPDATE_USER_ID = #{insertUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.CART_ITEM_ID AS cartId, A.USER_ID, A.ITEM_ID, A.ITEM_TYPE, A.AVAIL_DAY, B.PRODUCT_NAME AS itemName, D.FILE_PATH AS itemPath, COUNT(A.ITEM_ID) AS itemCount, B.PRODUCT_TYPE AS category FROM USER_CART A INNER JOIN PRODUCT B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.PRODUCT_ID INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE D ON B.ATTACH_FILE_ID = D.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.ITEM_TYPE = #{itemType} GROUP BY A.ITEM_ID, A.ITEM_TYPE, A.AVAIL_DAY,B.PRODUCT_NAME, D.FILE_PATH ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT

SELECT A.CART_ITEM_ID AS cartId, A.USER_ID, A.ITEM_ID, A.ITEM_TYPE, B.BGM_NAME AS itemName, D.FILE_PATH AS itemPath FROM USER_CART A INNER JOIN BGM B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.BGM_ID INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE D ON B.IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID = D.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.ITEM_TYPE = #{itemType} ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT
SELECT B.PRICE FROM PRODUCT A LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_PRICE B ON A.PRODUCT_ID = B.PRODUCT_ID WHERE B.AVAIL_DAY = #{availDay} AND B.PRODUCT_ID = #{itemId}
SELECT B.PRICE FROM BGM A LEFT JOIN BGM_PRICE B ON A.BGM_ID = B.BGM_ID WHERE B.BGM_ID = #{itemId}
